ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated topic */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the question was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the question */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation for the correct answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the answer is correct or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the answer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the answer was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the answer */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic (for hierarchical organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assessment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assessment was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "passing_score" REAL /* Minimum score required to pass the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "assessment_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment-question link */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated question */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the question within the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the assessment */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assessment was completed */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the assessment in seconds */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user passed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments about the assessment */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was logged */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "question_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-tag link */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated question */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_tags" (
  "assessment_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment-tag link */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated assessment */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_tags_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)
